UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile, including their permissions.

isAdmin.description: Indicates if the user has administrator privileges.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a design project within the DecoInnova Toolkit.

userId.description: Reference to the User who created the project. (Relationship: User 1:N Project)

materials.description: An array of material identifiers used in the project. (Relationship: Project 1:N Material)

surfaces.description: An array of surface identifiers defined for the project. (Relationship: Project 1:N Surface)

remnants.description: An array of remnant identifiers available for the project. (Relationship: Project 1:N Remnant)

materialUsageCount.description: The number of materials used in the project.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the project was last updated.

measurements.description: An array of measurement identifiers recorded for the project. (Relationship: Project 1:N Measurement)

Material.title: Material
Material.description: Represents a material definition used in a project.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the material (e.g., square feet, meters).

Surface.title: Surface
Surface.description: Represents a surface definition in a project.

shape.description: The shape of the surface (e.g., rectangle, circle).

Remnant.title: Remnant
Remnant.description: Represents a remnant piece of material.

materialId.description: Reference to the Material this remnant came from. (Relationship: Material 1:N Remnant)

isUsable.description: Indicates whether the remnant is usable.

Measurement.title: Measurement
Measurement.description: Represents a measurement taken within the editor.

x1.description: The x coordinate of the start point.

y1.description: The y coordinate of the start point.

x2.description: The x coordinate of the end point.

y2.description: The y coordinate of the end point.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile data, including role-based permissions.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Stores project data. Access is granted to the project owner (userId) or an administrator.

/defaultMaterials/{materialId}.description: Stores standard material definitions available to all users.

/projects/{projectId}/{document=**}.description: Allows read/write access to project sub-collections (surfaces, obstacles, pieces) if the user is the project owner OR an administrator. The admin check is performed by getting the user's profile and checking the `isAdmin` field.
